setupSteps: Connect your GitHub account so Codex can access repository code.
Use Codex in your eligible plan (Plus, Pro, Business, Edu, or Enterprise).

capabilities.name: Learn about prompting
capabilities.description: Write clearer prompts, apply constraints, and choose detail depth for better coding results.

capabilities.name: Common workflows
capabilities.description: Use repeatable patterns for task delegation, review, and PR creation.

capabilities.name: Environment configuration
capabilities.description: Define repository, setup steps, and available tools for cloud execution.

capabilities.name: IDE cloud delegation
capabilities.description: Start cloud tasks from the IDE extension, monitor progress, and apply diffs locally.

capabilities.name: GitHub delegation
capabilities.description: Tag `@codex` in issues and pull requests to spawn tasks directly from GitHub.

capabilities.name: Internet access control
capabilities.description: Control if and when Codex cloud environments can reach the public internet.
